ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait after the selection stops changing before copying. Lower values feel more immediate; higher values reduce clipboard churn during fast keyboard selection.
ast.target: 选择停止变化后等待多久再进行复制。较低的值感觉更即时；较高的值可以减少快速键盘选择期间的剪贴板变动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Selections shorter than this are ignored. A value of 1 copies every non-empty selection; raise it to skip single-character noise from accidental clicks or caret placement.
ast.target: 短于此长度的选区将被忽略。值为 1 会复制所有非空选区；提高该值可以跳过意外点击或光标放置产生的单字符噪声。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Briefly display a toast each time text is copied. Handy while tuning settings; most users will want this off.
ast.target: 每次复制文本时短暂显示一个提示。在调整设置时很方便；大多数用户会希望关闭此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also fire after a touch-based selection on mobile. iOS restricts clipboard writes outside of direct user gestures, so this may silently fail in some contexts.
ast.target: 在移动设备上基于触摸的选择后也会触发。iOS 限制在直接用户手势之外写入剪贴板，因此在某些情况下可能会静默失败。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore every setting on this page to its default value.
ast.target: 将此页面上的所有设置恢复为默认值。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在触摸设备上启用（移动端）

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 选择时复制：设置已重置
